name: fatima-anniversary-reminder
prompt: Remind the user that their anniversary with Fatima (January 1st) is in one week. Suggest gift ideas related to Dakar, Senegal or Greensboro, NC.

name: compendium-maintenance-daily
prompt: Perform a 'lint' operation on the compendium. Check for broken links, inconsistent formatting, missing metadata, and ensure the structure follows the established standards from [references/rules.md](references/rules.md). Fix any and all issues found.

name: daily-ai-news-test-docs
prompt: Research the top 3-5 AI news stories from the last 24 hours. Summarize them concisely and post the breakdown to the Discord channel with ID 1492425568971395082. Use clear headers and links to sources.
